---
title: "DAH30"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      error = TRUE)
```

Last modified: `r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`

```{r libraries, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(labelled)
library(openxlsx)

# if you don't have any of the above packages installed, run the line below.
# install.packages(c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "readxl", "labelled", "openxlsx))
```

### 30-Day Home Time as a Patient-Centered Outcome

```{r load data}
data <- read_excel("minimum_dataset.xlsx", 
    col_types = c("text", "date", "date", 
        "date", "date", "date", "date", "date", 
        "date", "date", "date", "date", "date", 
        "date", "date", "date", "date", "date", 
        "date", "date", "date", "date", "date", 
        "text")) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  mutate(
    days_30_interval = interval(procedure_date, procedure_date + days(30)),
    days_30_readmission_interval_1 = interval(readmission_admission_date_1, readmission_discharge_date_1),
    days_30_readmission_interval_2 = interval(readmission_admission_date_2, readmission_discharge_date_2),
    days_30_readmission_interval_3 = interval(readmission_admission_date_3, readmission_discharge_date_3),
    days_30_readmission_interval_4 = interval(readmission_admission_date_4, readmission_discharge_date_4),
    days_30_readmission_interval_5 = interval(readmission_admission_date_5, readmission_discharge_date_5),
    days_30_rehab_interval_1 = interval(rehab_admission_date_1, rehab_discharge_date_1),
    days_30_rehab_interval_2 = interval(rehab_admission_date_2, rehab_discharge_date_2),
    days_30_rehab_interval_3 = interval(rehab_admission_date_3, rehab_discharge_date_3),
    days_30_rehab_interval_4 = interval(rehab_admission_date_4, rehab_discharge_date_4),
    days_30_rehab_interval_5 = interval(rehab_admission_date_5, rehab_discharge_date_5),
    days_30_postop_interval = interval(procedure_date, procedure_discharge_date)) %>% 
   pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("days_30_readmission_interval_"),
    names_to = "readmission_number",
    names_prefix = "days_30_readmission_interval_",
    values_to = "readmission_intervals",
    values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) %>%
  nest(readmission = c(readmission_number, readmission_intervals)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("days_30_rehab_interval_"),
    names_to = "rehab_number",
    names_prefix = "days_30_rehab_interval_",
    values_to = "rehab_intervals",
    values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) %>%
  nest(rehab = c(rehab_number, rehab_intervals)) %>%
  mutate(
    total_readmission = map_dbl(readmission, nrow),
    readmissions_intervals = map(readmission, ~ pull(.x, readmission_intervals)),
    total_rehab = map_dbl(rehab, nrow),
    rehab_intervals = map(rehab, ~ pull(.x, rehab_intervals))) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    intervals_to_subtract = pmap(
      select(., rehab_intervals, days_30_postop_interval, readmissions_intervals),
      function(...) {c(...) %>% na.omit()}),
    merged_intervals = map(intervals_to_subtract, function(intervals) {
      if(length(intervals) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      # Remove NULL and NA values
      valid_intervals <- intervals[!sapply(intervals, is.null) & !sapply(intervals, is.na)]
      if(length(valid_intervals) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      # Sort intervals by start time
      sorted <- valid_intervals[order(sapply(valid_intervals, function(x) {
        tryCatch(int_start(x), error = function(e) NULL)
      }))]
      sorted <- sorted[!sapply(sorted, is.null)]
      
      # Initialize result with first interval
      result <- sorted[1]
      if(length(sorted) == 1) return(result)
      
      # Merge overlapping intervals
      for(i in 2:length(sorted)) {
        current <- sorted[i]
        last <- result[length(result)]
        
        if(tryCatch(int_overlaps(last, current), error = function(e) FALSE)) {
          # Merge overlapping intervals
          result[length(result)] <- interval(
            min(int_start(last), int_start(current)),
            max(int_end(last), int_end(current))
          )
        } else {
          # Add non-overlapping interval
          result <- c(result, current)
        }
      }
      result
    }),
    overlap_days = map2_dbl(days_30_interval, merged_intervals, function(main, others) {
      if(is.null(others)) return(0)
      sum(sapply(others, function(x) {
        tryCatch(time_length(intersect(main, x), unit = "days"), error = function(e) 0)
      }), na.rm = T)}),
    days_30_home = case_when(
      death_within_30_days == "TRUE" ~ 0,
      .default = 30 - overlap_days) # 30DHT = 0 if death
  ) 
```

```{r 30_day_home_time}
data %>% 
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(days_30_home), 
    median = median(days_30_home), 
    q1 = quantile(days_30_home, probs = 0.25),  
    q3 = quantile(days_30_home, probs = 0.75))
```

```{r save_your_data}
data %>% 
  select(-c(rehab, readmission, intervals_to_subtract)) %>%
  write.xlsx("30days.xlsx")
```
